title: Mapbox GL JS not defined error
symptom: The WeWeb editor displays 'ReferenceError: mapboxgl is not defined' when trying to use Mapbox functionality. This prevents the mapping of points on the map.
applies_when: Attempting to use Mapbox GL JS features
not_this_if: Mapbox functionality works in published mode
root_cause: The error occurs because the Mapbox GL JS library is not properly loaded or initialized in the WeWeb environment. This can happen if the library is not included in the project or if there are issues with the script loading order.
fix_steps: Ensure that the Mapbox GL JS library is included in your project settings.
Check the order of script loading to ensure Mapbox is loaded before any custom scripts that reference it.
agent_instruction: Verify that the Mapbox GL JS library is correctly included and loaded in your project.
